time.description: Time/timezone utility. stdio runs inside the metamcp pod via the bundled uvx toolchain.

digikey.description: DigiKey component search + MyLists (3-legged OAuth, rotating token cached on the backend PVC).

playwright-stealth.description: Stealth headless-browser automation. Highest prompt-injection surface; isolate in the 'browser' namespace.

grafana.description: Read-only Grafana. Queries Prometheus/VictoriaMetrics/Loki/VictoriaLogs through Grafana datasources.
